title: Tensura: Reincarnated
description: You awaken as a newly reincarnated soul. Your journey begins with a single decision: choose your race, obtain your first skill, and carve your path forward.
body:
You awaken as a newly reincarnated soul. Your journey begins with a single decision: choose your race, obtain your first skill, and carve your path forward.

Explore a landscape filled with custom biomes, unique structures, and fully populated civilizations. Encounter distinct races, each with their own villages, behaviors, and systems. Every region offers new opportunities, and new threats.

_Your progression is not fixed._

Master a wide range of abilities and define your own playstyle. Become a magic caster commanding spirits and wielding complex spell combinations, or a disciplined swordmaster focused on precision and raw combat power. Every build is viable. Every path is open

Rise as a True Hero, protecting civilizations and standing against chaos. Or ascend as a True Demon Lord, ruling through power and domination. Both paths lead to the pinnacle, but neither is forgiving.

_Power must be earned._

Face unique monsters and large-scale bosses that act as true progression gates. Defeat the Orc Disaster and his army. Survive encounters against Charybdis and the Megalodons. Challenge Shizu and Ifrit.

_Beyond them, greater threats await._

Hinata Sakaguchi stands as one of the most dangerous opponents in the world. Equipped with advanced spiritual weaponry, divine magic, and overwhelming combat discipline, she is designed to test even the strongest players.

_Will you rise to the challenge?_

   
---

### The Advent of Magic - Tensura Reincarnated 1.21.1 Update   

Greetings adventurers,

The Advent of Magic update expands the world with new systems, new enemies, and a new level of progression.



Dwarves have been introduced as a fully integrated civilization.

Their villages are structured, defended, and economically active. Dwarves specialize in resource production, trade, and craftsmanship. Your reputation determines your standing. Act against them, and you will be hunted. Earn their trust, and you gain access to better trades and restricted areas.

At the extremes of reputation, a new opportunity unlocks.

Enter the Royal Tower and face Gazel Dwargo, the Hero King.

Wielding the Unique Sword Ruhk, Gazel combines precise swordplay with advanced battlewill techniques. His multi-phase combat patterns, including his 5-petal and 8-petal attacks, require mechanical mastery and positioning. This challenge will not be easy.



Hell is now populated with many powerful daemons, all wielding their own Aspectual Magic.

Magic has been significantly expanded. Aspectual Magic is a new form of magic learned from spell tomes.

Wizard Towers now appear across the world. These structures contain powerful tomes, but also introduce new equipment:

Grimoires and Magic Staves.

These items function as modular casting tools. They store spells, increase casting efficiency, and operate independently from your base abilities. This enables layered combat, chaining abilities and spells into complex combinations.

Travelling the world in search of the decrepit wizard towers can allow one to master the heights of magic,. 



New spell categories include:

Otherworlder Summoning
Daemon Summoning
Necromancy
Aspect-based utility and combat magic

There is something for everyone. 



New Sound and Visual effects have been added and old ones, along with models and textures have been improved, so you might find some mobs to look a bit different, but better regardless. All spells now have magic circles to improve the feel of casting magic.

Are you ready to explore this new chapter of Tensura Reincarnated?



Available now in both Neoforge and Fabric.

Content Creators:  
Feel free to make content with this mod and use this in modpacks but leave a link to this mod in the description. 
We also request that you inform viewers if you are using the Morph Mod or any similar mods that could create a misleading impression.

---

Permissions
You can use this mod in mod packs, videos, reviews, and servers.
You can not modify and share the mod without permission.
You can not repost the mod somewhere else without us knowing it.
You cannot sell mod related content for real money, or currency that can be bought with real money, nor duplicate items(with a different name) to bypass this rule.
We do not guarantee support or updates for unauthorized modifications or redistributions of the mod.
You cannot create derivative versions of this mod or use its assets in other mods without permission.
You must credit the original creators and leave a download link when using the mod in public mod packs, videos, or servers.
